---
title: "overfit_corrections.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/data/overfit_corrections.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.85
style_score: 3.96
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.20
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating overfit. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [sv_engine](file://sv_engine)

### Exports
- `overfit`
